IDLE EMPIRE — Criminal Idle Game (Closed Beta)
===============================================

LAUNCH
------
Double-click IdleEmpire.exe to start the game.

No installation required. No Python needed.


CONTROLS
--------
- Mouse: click everything
- ESC: pause / back
- All controls are shown in-game


CRASH REPORTS
-------------
If the game crashes, a file called crash.log will appear in this folder.
Attach it when reporting a bug.


BUG REPORTS & FEEDBACK
-----------------------
In-game: open the Config tab and press "Report Bug" or "Suggest Feature".
This copies your build info to the clipboard.

Send it to: ironassassin03@gmail.com


BUILD INFO
----------
Version: v1.0 (Closed Beta)
Platform: Windows (64-bit)
